---
title: "Week 1 Confetti Sampling"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# confetti counts per quadrat
x <- c(4, 2, 5, 2, 5, 4, 11, 5, 9, 7,
       2, 1, 7, 1, 17, 3, 17, 3, 0, 9,
       4, 12, 2, 8, 0, 10, 2, 4, 0, 3)

# number of samples
length(x)

# histogram
hist(x)
abline(v = mean(x), col="red")

# mean
mean(x)

# variance
var(x)

# standard deviation
sd(x)

# total quadrats
800

# estimated total confetti
mean(x) * 800

# standard error
800 * sd(x)/sqrt(30)
